titleJa: AI エージェント導入の論点は、単体性能よりもワークフロー設計へ
titleEn: AI agent adoption is shifting from model-only performance to workflow design
summaryJa: ReAct、Toolformer、WebArena、SWE-bench を手がかりに、企業導入の焦点が『高性能な単体モデル』から『ツール接続・評価・制御を含む運用設計』へ移っていることを整理する。
summaryEn: Using ReAct, Toolformer, WebArena, and SWE-bench as anchors, this briefing outlines how enterprise adoption is moving from model-only performance toward workflow design with tools, evaluation, and control.

publishedSources.label: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools
WebArena: A Realistic Web Environment for Building Autonomous Agents
SWE-bench: Can Language Models Resolve Real-World GitHub Issues?
